chain_of_thought: There are three blocks that need to move to the top left corner. I will move them one at a time.
The yellow one refers to the yellow block. The green thing is the green bowl. I need to place the yellow block on the green bowl.
The light colored block is the yellow block. I need to move it to the middle of the workspace.
There are three blocks: blue, red, and green. To stack them I place one on top of another.
The blue objects are the blue block and the blue bowl. I need to move the blue block to the blue bowl.
I need to place each colored block into the bowl of the same color: green to green, red to red, yellow to yellow.
There are four blocks and four corners. I need to place one block in each corner.
